articles.excerpt: World models are increasingly regarded as a decisive step toward artificial general intelligence, yet modeling the physical world demands more than rendering convincing frames on demand: it requires an internal world state that keeps evolving over time, decoupled from observation, so that objects endure and events run to their conclusions whether or not a camera is watching, much as the moon holds
articles.summary: 指出当前世界模型缺乏独立于观测的持久状态核心，物理世界建模需构建随时间演化、与观测解耦的内部状态，使对象持续存在。该方向对具身智能和AGI发展具有根本性意义。

articles.title: S-Agent: Spatial Tool-Use Elicits Reasoning for Spatial Intelligence
articles.excerpt: Real-world spatial intelligence requires reasoning over a continuous and evolving 3D world, yet existing VLMs and tool-augmented agents largely remain tied to static, stateless inference from isolated visual observations. We introduce \textsc{S-Agent}, a spatial tool-use agentic paradigm for understanding and reasoning over continuous multi-view images and videos. By formulating spatial reasoning
articles.summary: 提出S-Agent空间工具使用智能体范式，通过连续多视图图像和视频进行空间推理，将空间推理公式化为工具增强推理过程，解决现有VLM仅依赖静态观测的局限，为3D空间理解和连续环境推理提供新框架。

articles.title: Holo-World: Unified Camera, Object and Weather Control for Video World Model
articles.excerpt: Video world models are moving toward preserving an observed world under controllable camera and object motion while allowing its environmental state to change. Yet these controls remain isolated, and weather generation typically relies on a source video or reconstructed scene that already specifies future structure. We study a first-frame-anchored source-to-state setting, where the model starts fr
articles.summary: 提出Holo-World视频世界模型，统一控制相机运动、对象运动和天气变化，采用首帧锚定的源到状态设置，从单帧生成可控未来视频帧，避免依赖完整源视频，增强视频世界模型在环境状态变化下的可控性。

articles.title: ENPIRE: Agentic Robot Policy Self-Improvement in the Real World
articles.excerpt: Achieving dexterous robotic manipulation in the real world heavily relies on human supervision and algorithm engineering, which becomes a central bottleneck in the pursuit of general physical intelligence. Although emerging coding agents can generate code to automate algorithm search, their successes remain largely confined in digital environments. We conjecture that the missing abstraction to aut
articles.summary: 提出ENPIRE框架，使具身编码智能体在真实世界中通过自我指导的算法搜索实现机器人策略自我改进，解决机器人操作中依赖人工监督的瓶颈，将编码智能体从数字环境扩展到物理世界，推动通用物理智能发展。

articles.title: Manifold Bandits: Bayesian Curriculum Learning over the Latent Geometry of Large Language Models
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a central approach for improving reasoning capabilities in large language models (LLMs), where training efficiency depends critically on how problems are sampled during optimization. Existing adaptive curriculum learning methods typically prioritize prompts of intermediate difficulty, treating problem selection as a standard bandit problem with independent arms and o
articles.summary: 提出Manifold Bandits方法，在LLM潜在几何结构上进行贝叶斯课程学习，利用流形结构建模问题间依赖关系，替代传统独立臂老虎机，通过自适应采样中等难度问题提升强化学习训练效率，增强LLM推理能力。

articles.title: Beyond Static Leaderboards: Predictive Validity for the Evaluation of LLM Agents
articles.excerpt: Agent benchmarks are growing fast, but no single benchmark touches more than four or five of the dimensions that deployment exposes. This paper aggregates the largest coordinated deep-dive of one MCP-based industrial-agent benchmark to date: fourteen parallel implementation studies covering new asset classes (including a multi-modal visual extension), alternative orchestrations, retrieval strategi
articles.summary: 针对LLM代理基准维度单一问题，进行迄今最大规模协调深度分析（14项并行研究），涵盖多模态扩展、替代编排等，提出预测有效性评估方法超越静态排行榜，为工业MCP代理基准提供更全面的部署验证。

articles.title: Qwen-RobotNav Technical Report: A Scalable Navigation Model Designed for an Agentic Navigation System
articles.excerpt: Agentic navigation systems require a base navigation model whose observation strategy can be externally reconfigured at inference time, because instruction following, object search, target tracking, and autonomous driving share the same perception-planning backbone yet demand fundamentally different strategies for consuming the visual stream. We present Qwen-RobotNav, a scalable navigation model b
articles.summary: 提出Qwen-RobotNav可扩展导航模型，支持推理时外部重配置观测策略，适应指令跟随、目标搜索、自主驾驶等不同任务，共享感知规划骨干，为智能体导航系统提供统一基础模型。

articles.title: Configurable Clinical Information Extraction with Agentic RAG: What Works, What Breaks, and Why
articles.excerpt: Patient contexts span hundreds of heterogeneous documents and thousands of structured data points, yet the document-level metadata that AI systems need for retrieval and triage is absent or incomplete. Standard retrieval-augmented generation fails on this data, mishandling temporal reasoning, cross-document dependencies, and missing metadata. We deploy ACIE (Agentic Clinical Information Extraction
articles.summary: 推出ACIE（智能体临床信息提取）框架，解决标准RAG在临床数据上因缺失元数据、时间推理和跨文档依赖导致的失败，通过可配置智能体RAG从海量异构文档中提取临床信息，分析有效与失效模式，提升医疗AI可靠性。

articles.title: ImageWAM: Do World Action Models Really Need Video Generation, or Just Image Editing?
articles.excerpt: World Action Models (WAMs) commonly rely on video generation to bridge visual world modeling and robot control. However, video-based WAMs face three coupled limitations: dense multi-frame future tokens make inference costly, full video prediction spends capacity on action-irrelevant temporal and appearance details, and long-horizon future imagination may introduce errors that mislead action predic
articles.summary: ImageWAM质疑世界动作模型必须依赖视频生成的假设，提出仅需图像编辑即可实现视觉世界建模与机器人控制，避免视频生成的高成本、无关细节和长程错误累积，通过单帧编辑提供紧凑行动预测。

articles.title: Playful Agentic Robot Learning
articles.excerpt: Current agentic robot systems can write executable Code-as-Policy programs, observe feedback, and revise behavior across multiple attempts, but they remain largely task-driven: reusable skills are acquired only after explicit instructions. We study Playful Agentic Robot Learning, where an embodied coding agent uses self-directed play as a continual skill-learning stage before downstream tasks arri
articles.summary: 提出Playful Agentic Robot Learning范式，让具身编码智能体在下游任务前通过自导玩耍持续学习可复用技能（Code-as-Policy），突破当前任务驱动系统仅在明确指令后获取技能的局限，提升机器人泛化性。

articles.title: FlexLAM: Resolving the Bottleneck Trade-off in Latent Action Learning
articles.excerpt: Latent actions provide a compact interface between action-free video and downstream decision-making, yet existing Latent Action Models (LAMs) force every transition through a fixed-capacity bottleneck. We identify a bottleneck trade-off: overly tight codes can discard transition cues needed for action alignment, while overly loose codes preserve additional transition variation that must be resolve
articles.summary: 提出FlexLAM解决潜在动作模型中固定容量瓶颈的权衡：过紧编码丢弃转换线索，过松保留无关变化。通过灵活调整瓶颈容量，在动作对齐与转换变化保留间取得平衡，提升从无动作视频到下游决策的学习质量。
